old_post_content:
Some products leave such an impression that once you try them, you never want to let them go. The Holika Holika Daily Fresh Olive Cleansing Foam is one such gem. Perfect for Dhaka’s humid and polluted environment, this Korean beauty essential deeply cleanses your skin without stripping away its natural moisture. Whether you’re battling sweat, makeup, or dirt, this foam ensures your skin feels refreshed and radiant. The Emart team personally verified this product to ensure its quality and authenticity.

Why Choose This Product?

First, this cleansing foam effectively removes impurities while maintaining your skin’s natural moisture barrier. In Dhaka’s harsh weather, keeping your skin hydrated is crucial, and this product does just that. It’s gentle yet powerful, making it suitable for all skin types.

Second, it’s enriched with olive extract, known for its nourishing and antioxidant properties. This helps protect your skin from environmental stressors like pollution and heat, which are common in urban areas. Your skin feels soft, smooth, and revitalized after every use.

Third, its lightweight foam texture makes it easy to apply and rinse off, leaving no residue behind. It’s perfect for those busy days when you need a quick yet thorough cleanse. Plus, it’s affordable for its premium quality, making it a must-have in your skincare routine.

Key Ingredients

Olive Extract: Rich in antioxidants and vitamins, olive extract nourishes and hydrates the skin, leaving it soft and supple. It’s perfect for combating dryness caused by Dhaka’s heat.

Glycerin: This humectant attracts moisture to the skin, ensuring it stays hydrated even in humid conditions. It helps maintain your skin’s natural balance.

Aloe Vera: Known for its soothing properties, aloe vera calms irritated skin and reduces redness. It’s ideal for sensitive skin exposed to pollution and sun.

How to Use It

Start by wetting your face with lukewarm water. Take a small amount of the cleansing foam and gently massage it onto your skin in circular motions. Focus on areas prone to dirt and oil buildup, like your T-zone. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat your face dry with a clean towel. Use it twice daily—morning and night—for best results.

When it comes to skincare, authenticity matters. The Holika Holika Daily Fresh Olive Cleansing Foam is 100% authentic Korean product. At just ৳900, it’s a steal for its quality and effectiveness. Dhaka residents can enjoy fast delivery within 1-2 days, while the rest of the country will receive it in 3-5 days. Cash on Delivery (COD) is also available, making it convenient for everyone. Trust me, your skin will thank you for this upgrade!
